title: Messages API 请求结构：三个必填字段
title_en: Messages API Request Structure: Three Required Fields

body.concept: 每个 Messages API 请求只需要三个必填字段：model（选哪个模型）、max_tokens（最多生成多少 token）、messages（对话内容数组）。响应返回一个 message 对象，包含 role: assistant、content 数组（每个元素有 type 和 text）、以及 usage 字段（统计输入/输出 token 数）。stop_reason 告诉你模型为什么停止：end_turn 表示自然结束，max_tokens 表示达到上限被截断。
body.analogy: 就像点餐：你告诉服务员「我要什么菜」（model）、「最多花多少钱」（max_tokens）、「具体要哪几道」（messages）。服务员回来时会告诉你上了什么菜（content）、花了多少钱（usage）、以及为什么停了——菜上齐了还是预算用完了（stop_reason）。
body.visual: 左边是请求 JSON：{ model, max_tokens, messages[] }。箭头指向右边的响应 JSON：{ id, role, content[], stop_reason, usage: {input_tokens, output_tokens} }。

body_en.concept: Every Messages API request needs just three required fields: model (which Claude model to use), max_tokens (maximum tokens to generate), and messages (array of conversation turns). The response returns a message object with role: assistant, a content array (each element has type and text), and a usage field (counting input/output tokens). stop_reason tells you why the model stopped: end_turn means it finished naturally, max_tokens means it was cut off.
body_en.analogy: Like ordering at a restaurant: you tell the waiter what cuisine (model), your budget cap (max_tokens), and your specific dishes (messages). The waiter returns with what was served (content), the bill (usage), and why service stopped — all dishes served, or budget reached (stop_reason).
body_en.visual: Left side shows request JSON: { model, max_tokens, messages[] }. Arrow points to response JSON: { id, role, content[], stop_reason, usage: {input_tokens, output_tokens} }.
